data.body: Implemented: TrackerConfig section + branch/dir validators + env alias + rebar config surfacing + docs (config.md, README, architecture.md). Subagent code review: clean, no blockers; applied its cleanups (dead \x00 clause, redundant .lock check). 220 config tests pass; ruff clean. Note: tracker_dir()/tickets_branch() routing is deliberately deferred to child 8f43 (this child is plumbing only).
